SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT (the "SPA")

This Share Purchase Agreement is made on the 1st day of November, 2023.

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC No.: S2345678B), of 123 Jurong Lane, Singapore 639456, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: weiming.tan@example.sg;

AND

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No.: S8765432C), of 456 Bukit Timah Road, Singapore 269456, and reachable at +65 9876 5432, email: siti.aisah@example.sg;

AND

3. Ramasamy Muthu, representing SingInvest Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 200912345E), a company incorporated in Singapore with its registered office at 789 Shenton Way, Singapore 079121.

WHEREAS:

A. The Sellers wish to sell and the Buyer wishes to purchase 1,000,000 ordinary shares in the capital of SingInvest Pte. Ltd. for the total consideration of SGD 5,000,000.

B. The parties have agreed that this SPA does not include obligations related to any current project plan or project status reports.

C. The Buyer will wire the funds to account number 123-456-789 at Example Bank.

All references to the SPA shall mean this Share Purchase Agreement.
